title: iberis intermedia proles durandii
intro: Iberis intermedia proles durandii, commonly known as Candytuft, is a flowering plant in the mustard family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Candytuft include its ability to reduce fever and relieve respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Candytuft can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
